name: write-card
description: 链湴鍐欏崱缃戠珯 - 鍩轰簬鏄庢湀绉嬮潚鍐欏崱棰勮

scripts.android:sync: npm run sync:capacitor-assets && npx cap sync android
scripts.build:apk: npm run android:sync && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Set-Location android; if (Test-Path .\gradlew.bat) { .\gradlew.bat assembleDebug } else { throw 'Missing android\\gradlew.bat' }"
scripts.build:release: npm run prepare:release && npm run build:exe
